The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering various health benefits, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which can aid in treating respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems. The most common herbal preparations made with Xylopia xylopia include decoctions, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and provide relief from symptoms.
